content.text:
Here's the full repo structure and tech stack:

---

## Repository Structure

```
goon/
├── .env.example
├── .env.local
├── .gitignore
├── .cave_session.json
├── .oc_session_id
├── README.md
├── _analysis_note.md
├── middleware.ts
├── next-env.d.ts
├── next.config.ts
├── package.json
├── package-lock.json
├── postcss.config.mjs
├── tsconfig.json
├── app/
│   ├── globals.css
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   ├── page.tsx
│   ├── login/
│   │   └── page.tsx
│   ├── register/
│   │   └── page.tsx
│   └── dashboard/
│       ├── layout.tsx
│       ├── page.tsx
│       ├── portfolio/
│       │   └── page.tsx
│       ├── settings/
│       │   ├── SettingsClient.tsx
│       │   └── page.tsx
│       └── strategies/
│           ├── StrategiesClient.tsx
│           └── page.tsx
├── frontend/
│   └── lib/
│       ├── api/
│       │   ├── predictions.ts
│       │   └── watchlist.ts
│       ├── auth.ts
│       ├── db.ts
│       ├── predictions.ts
│       ├── supabase.ts
│       └── types.ts
└── lib/
    └── supabase/
        ├── client.ts
        └── server.ts
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Category | Technology |
|---|---|
| **Framework** | Next.js 15 (App Router, Turbopack dev) |
| **UI Library** | React 19 |
| **Language** | TypeScript 5.8 |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS v4 (with `@tailwindcss/postcss`) |
| **Auth** | next-auth v5 (beta), bcryptjs |
| **Database** | Supabase (`@supabase/supabase-js` v2.50, `@supabase/ssr` v0.6) — also `better-sqlite3` for local/SQLite usage |
| **Package Manager** | npm |

### Summary
This is a **Next.js 15 App Router** project using **React 19**, **TypeScript**, and **Tailwind CSS v4**. Authentication is handled via **next-auth v5** with bcrypt password hashing. Data layer is **Supabase** (Postgres) with SSR support, plus **better-sqlite3** for local DB operations. The app has public pages (login, register, landing) and a dashboard with portfolio, strategies, settings, watchlist, and predictions features.

content.thinking: I've now read every single file in the repository. Let me compile a comprehensive summary.

content.text:
Here's the full repository breakdown:

---

## Complete Directory Structure

```
goon/                                  — "Goon" — AI Trading Platform
├── .env.example                       # environment variable template (DATABASE_URL, SECRET_KEY, etc.)
├── .env.local                         # local env overrides (gitignored)
├── .gitignore                         # ignores node_modules, .next, __pycache__, .env
├── .cave_session.json                 # Cave agent session metadata
├── .oc_session_id                     # session ID
├── README.md                          # "Goon: Autonomous AI trading platform for retail investors"
├── _analysis_note.md                  # analysis notes
│
├── package.json                       # Next.js 15 + React 19 + Supabase + Tailwind v4
├── package-lock.json
├── tsconfig.json                      # strict TS, bundler mode, path alias @/*
├── next.config.ts                     # default Next.js config
├── postcss.config.mjs                 # @tailwindcss/postcss plugin
├── next-env.d.ts                      # Next.js type declarations
├── middleware.ts                      # Supabase SSR auth middleware (protects /dashboard)
│
├── app/                               # Next.js App Router
│   ├── globals.css                    # Tailwind v4 @theme (navy, cobalt, accent colors)
│   ├── layout.tsx                     # Root layout: html lang="en", metadata "Goon - AI Trading Platform"
│   ├── page.tsx                       # Landing page: hero "Autonomous AI Trading Agents", features grid
│   ├── login/
│   │   └── page.tsx                   # "use client" — Supabase email/password sign-in form
│   ├── register/
│   │   └── page.tsx                   # "use client" — Supabase email/password sign-up form
│   └── dashboard/
│       ├── layout.tsx                 # "use client" — sidebar nav (Dashboard, Portfolio, Strategies, Settings) + top bar
│       ├── page.tsx                   # Server component — welcome card, portfolio cards, recent activity table
│       ├── portfolio/
│       │   └── page.tsx               # Server component — 8-row holdings table (AAPL, NVDA, MSFT, etc.)
│       ├── strategies/
│       │   ├── page.tsx               # Server component — thin wrapper, renders StrategiesClient
│       │   └── StrategiesClient.tsx   # "use client" — 3 AI strategies with toggle switches (Trend, Reversion, Sentiment)
│       └── settings/
│           ├── page.tsx               # Server component — thin wrapper, renders SettingsClient
│           └── SettingsClient.tsx     # "use client" — email change form, profile info, danger zone
│
├── frontend/
│   └── lib/
│       ├── types.ts                   # User, WatchlistItem, Prediction interfaces
│       ├── db.ts                      # JSON file-based DB (users.json, watchlists.json, predictions.json)
│       ├── auth.ts                    # Supabase SSR auth helper (with cookie fallback)
│       ├── supabase.ts                # Dynamic client factory (fallback if @supabase/supabase-js missing)
│       ├── predictions.ts             # Seeded deterministic prediction engine per ticker
│       └── api/
│           ├── predictions.ts         # GET /api/predictions — auth-gated, generates predictions for watchlist
│           └── watchlist.ts           # GET/POST/DELETE /api/watchlist — CRUD with auth
│
└── lib/
    └── supabase/
        ├── client.ts                  # createBrowserClient (client-side Supabase)
        └── server.ts                  # createServerClient (server-side Supabase with cookie management)
```

---

## package.json — Tech Stack

| Category | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| **Framework** | Next.js (App Router, Turbopack) | ^15.3.3 |
| **UI** | React + React DOM | ^19.1.0 |
| **Language** | TypeScript | ^5.8.3 |
| **CSS** | Tailwind CSS v4 + `@tailwindcss/postcss` | ^4.1.0 |
| **Auth** | next-auth | ^5.0.0-beta.25 |
| **Password hashing** | bcryptjs | ^2.4.3 |
| **Database (cloud)** | @supabase/supabase-js + @supabase/ssr | ^2.50.0 / ^0.6.1 |
| **Database (local)** | better-sqlite3 | ^12.10.1 |

---

## What This Repo Is

**Goon** — an autonomous AI trading platform for retail investors. It's a Next.js 15 app with:

1. **Public landing page** — "Autonomous AI Trading Agents" hero with 3 feature cards
2. **Auth flow** — Supabase email/password login & registration (client-side forms)
3. **Protected dashboard** — middleware redirects unauthenticated users away from `/dashboard`
4. **Dashboard sections**: Overview (welcome + portfolio cards + activity table), Portfolio (holdings table), Strategies (3 AI strategies with toggle enable/disable), Settings (profile + email change + danger zone)
5. **Dual data layer**: Supabase (Postgres) for auth/production, JSON file-based storage (`frontend/lib/db.ts`) for local/dev
6. **API routes**: `/api/predictions` (seeded AI predictions per watchlist ticker) and `/api/watchlist` (full CRUD)
7. **Custom theme**: Tailwind v4 `@theme` with `navy`, `cobalt`, `accent` (green), `navy-100` colors

The app has mock/hardcoded data in the dashboard and portfolio pages (static arrays), plus functional API endpoints backed by the JSON file DB.
